summary: Completed comprehensive testing of the email capture functionality for abandoned assessments. All 10 required features tested successfully including user info capture, status tracking, admin dashboard filtering, and end-to-end flow.
passed_tests: User info capture before questions (POST /api/assessment/capture) - saves with 'abandoned' status
Assessment completion changes status from 'abandoned' to 'completed'
Admin dashboard displays Status column with completed/abandoned badges
Admin dashboard status filter (All/Completed/Abandoned) works correctly
Stats display shows completed and abandoned counts separately (Total: 9, Completed: 3, Abandoned: 3)
CSV export includes status column with proper filtering
User detail page shows status badge for both completed and abandoned users
User detail page shows 'No Responses Yet' message for abandoned users
End-to-end flow: capture -> questions -> submit -> result works correctly
Abandoned user creation: user info captured but assessment not completed remains 'abandoned'
Backend API tests: 19/19 tests passed including new capture endpoint
Status filtering in admin endpoints works correctly
CSV export with status filtering works correctly
User navigation and form validation works properly
Mock integrations (ActiveCampaign, WhatsApp) trigger correctly on completion
